languages.original_text: "When dwelling on the consequences, we must not forget the cause. If we do not come to understand and destroy xenos like the ones that captured the ship, the loss of Jesevon will be only the first link in a chain of great calamities. If I could lay my hands on a living specimen, if I could find a way to combat their invasive genome..."

languages.text: "Задумываясь о следствии, не стоит забывать про причину. Если не постичь и не уничтожить ксеносов, подобных тем, что захватили судно, гибель "Йесевона" станет лишь первым звеном в цепи значительных бед. Если бы я мог заполучить живой экземпляр, чтобы изыскать способ борьбы с их инвазивным геномом..."

"When dwelling on the consequences, we must not forget the cause. languages.text: «Cuando nos centramos en las consecuencias, no debemos olvidar la causa. Si no nos esforzamos por comprender y destruimos a los xenos como los que capturaron la nave, la pérdida de Jesevon solo será la primera en una cadena de grandes calamidades. Si pudiera obtener un espécimen con vida, podría encontrar la forma de combatir su genoma invasivo...».
languages.original_text: "When dwelling on the consequences, we must not forget the cause. If we do not come to understand and destroy xenos like the ones that captured the ship, the loss of Jesevon will be only the first link in a chain of great calamities. If I could lay my hands on a living specimen, if I could find a way to combat their invasive genome..."

traits.locale_text: «Cuando nos centramos en las consecuencias, no debemos olvidar la causa. Si no nos esforzamos por comprender y destruimos a los xenos como los que capturaron la nave, la pérdida de Jesevon solo será la primera en una cadena de grandes calamidades. Si pudiera obtener un espécimen con vida, podría encontrar la forma de combatir su genoma invasivo...».

languages.text: 「結果について思いを巡らせるとき、我々は原因を忘れてはなりません。艦を捕らえたあのような異種族を理解し、滅ぼすことができなければ、ジェセヴォンの喪失は、大いなる災厄の連鎖の、最初の環にすぎなくなるでしょう。もし生きた標本を手に入れられたなら、もし奴らの侵襲性ゲノムに対抗する術を見出せたなら……」
languages.original_text: "When dwelling on the consequences, we must not forget the cause. If we do not come to understand and destroy xenos like the ones that captured the ship, the loss of Jesevon will be only the first link in a chain of great calamities. If I could lay my hands on a living specimen, if I could find a way to combat their invasive genome..."

traits.locale_text: 「結果について思いを巡らせるとき、我々は原因を忘れてはなりません。艦を捕らえたあのような異種族を理解し、滅ぼすことができなければ、ジェセヴォンの喪失は、大いなる災厄の連鎖の、最初の環にすぎなくなるでしょう。もし生きた標本を手に入れられたなら、もし奴らの侵襲性ゲノムに対抗する術を見出せたなら……」

languages.text: “思索后果时，我们绝不能忘记其原由。如果我们不去研究并消灭那群占据飞船的异形，那么杰西文的损失不过是一连串灾难的开端。要是我能弄到一个活体样本，要是我能找到对抗它们侵略性基因的方法……”
languages.original_text: "When dwelling on the consequences, we must not forget the cause. If we do not come to understand and destroy xenos like the ones that captured the ship, the loss of Jesevon will be only the first link in a chain of great calamities. If I could lay my hands on a living specimen, if I could find a way to combat their invasive genome..."

traits.locale_text: “思索后果时，我们绝不能忘记其原由。如果我们不去研究并消灭那群占据飞船的异形，那么杰西文的损失不过是一连串灾难的开端。要是我能弄到一个活体样本，要是我能找到对抗它们侵略性基因的方法……”

languages.text: "Wenn wir über die Wirkung reden dürfen wir die Ursache nicht außer Acht lassen. Wenn wir nicht anfangen, die Xenos zu verstehen und zu vernichten, war der Verlust von Jasevon nur der Beginn einer langen Reihe schrecklicher Katastrophen. Könnte ich mit einem lebendigen Exemplar arbeiten, fände ich vielleicht ein Mittel gegen ihr invasives Genom ..."
languages.original_text: "When dwelling on the consequences, we must not forget the cause. If we do not come to understand and destroy xenos like the ones that captured the ship, the loss of Jesevon will be only the first link in a chain of great calamities. If I could lay my hands on a living specimen, if I could find a way to combat their invasive genome..."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn wir über die Wirkung reden dürfen wir die Ursache nicht außer Acht lassen. Wenn wir nicht anfangen, die Xenos zu verstehen und zu vernichten, war der Verlust von Jasevon nur der Beginn einer langen Reihe schrecklicher Katastrophen. Könnte ich mit einem lebendigen Exemplar arbeiten, fände ich vielleicht ein Mittel gegen ihr invasives Genom ..."

languages.text: « Lorsque nous analysons les conséquences, nous ne devons pas oublier la cause. Si nous ne comprenons et ne détruisons pas les xénos comme ceux qui ont capturé le vaisseau, alors la perte de Jesevon ne sera que le premier maillon dans une chaîne de catastrophes. Si je pouvais mettre la main sur un spécimen vivant, je pourrais trouver un moyen de combattre leur génome invasif... »
languages.original_text: "When dwelling on the consequences, we must not forget the cause. If we do not come to understand and destroy xenos like the ones that captured the ship, the loss of Jesevon will be only the first link in a chain of great calamities. If I could lay my hands on a living specimen, if I could find a way to combat their invasive genome..."

Si je pouvais mettre la main sur un spécimen vivant, je pourrais trouver un moyen de combattre leur génome invasif... »

languages.text: "Sonuçlar üzerinde dururken nedeni unutmamalıyız. Eğer gemiyi ele geçirenler gibi zenoları anlamaz ve yok etmezsek Jesevon'un kaybı, büyük felaketler zincirinin sadece ilk halkası olacaktır. Keşke canlı bir deneği elime geçirebilseydim, istilacı genomlarıyla savaşmanın bir yolunu bulabilseydim..."
